title: Dekton One Hand Swivel Shear – 360° Swivel Blade for Precision Cutting | Sharp, Durable Blades | Ergonomic One-Handed Operation | Ideal for Gardening, Landscaping, and Pruning Tasks
features: 360° Swivel Blade for Maximum Precision: The Dekton One Hand Swivel Shear features a 360° rotating blade, allowing for precise cutting at any angle. Whether trimming awkward branches or shaping hedges, this shear ensures optimal control.

Sharp, Durable Blades for Effortless Cutting: Designed with high-quality, sharp blades, the swivel shear delivers smooth, clean cuts through a variety of materials, from branches to shrubs, without crushing plant tissues.

One-Handed Operation for Ease of Use: The shear is designed for one-handed operation, making it simple to use with minimal effort. Its ergonomic handle offers a comfortable grip, reducing hand strain during extended cutting tasks.

Heavy-Duty Build for Long-Term Durability: Made from high-grade, corrosion-resistant materials, this swivel shear is built to last through multiple seasons of use. It’s perfect for both professional landscapers and home gardeners.

Versatile Tool for Multiple Gardening Needs: Ideal for trimming, pruning, and shaping, this swivel shear is versatile enough to handle a wide range of gardening and landscaping tasks, providing precision and ease with every cut.
description: The Dekton One Hand Swivel Shear is designed for gardeners and landscapers who require precision and ease in their trimming and pruning tasks. With a 360° rotating blade, this shear offers unparalleled control, allowing you to cut at any angle with accuracy. The sharp, durable blades deliver clean cuts through branches, stems, and shrubs without damaging plant tissues, ensuring healthy growth. The ergonomic design enables one-handed operation, providing comfort and reducing hand fatigue during extended use. Built from heavy-duty, corrosion-resistant materials, this shear is crafted for long-lasting durability. Whether you’re trimming hedges, pruning branches, or shaping bushes, the Dekton One Hand Swivel Shear is the versatile tool you need to maintain your garden with precision.
